items.title: Exodus launches AI agent-focused stablecoin on Solana
items.whyYouShouldCare: The launch of an AI agent-focused stablecoin on Solana could enhance liquidity and attract new users, bolstering the ecosystem's growth.

items.title: AI agents fueled a frenzy of startup building at the Consensus Miami EasyA hackathon
items.whyYouShouldCare: The surge in AI startups at the Consensus Miami hackathon indicates increasing developer interest in Solana, which may drive innovation and ecosystem expansion.

items.title: Strong jobs data lifts rate-hike odds: Here’s why crypto still benefits
items.whyYouShouldCare: Strong jobs data may influence interest rates, but the crypto market's resilience suggests potential for continued engagement and usage within the Solana ecosystem.
